name: Neeva
tagline: Ad-free AI-powered search engine challenging Google
description: Founded by ex-Google SVP Sridhar Ramaswamy, Neeva raised $77.5M to build an ad-free search engine but couldn't convince users to pay $4.95/month to switch from Google.
story: Neeva was founded in 2019 by Sridhar Ramaswamy, the former SVP of Google Ads, with a bold thesis: users would pay for an ad-free, privacy-first search engine. The company raised $77.5 million and actually beat both Google and Microsoft to launching AI-powered search summaries. But technical superiority wasn't enough. Google's default search deals and browser integrations made user acquisition nearly impossible, and getting consumers to pay $4.95 per month for search — something they'd always had for free — proved to be an insurmountable barrier. Neeva shut down its consumer search product in June 2023 and was acquired by Snowflake to pivot its AI technology toward enterprise applications.

sources.title: Neeva gives up on consumer search
